context: Tests whether the agent implements inventory synchronization using the correct CSV parsing library with proper column mappings, zeroes out discontinued SKUs, schedules syncs at the correct interval using Promise.allSettled, correctly calculates gross margin from subtotal_cents and dropship order costs, and writes a SQL margin report filtered by the right statuses and time window.

checklist.name: csv-parse/sync import
checklist.description: The inventory sync code imports the parse function from 'csv-parse/sync' (not 'csv-parse' streaming API, not papaparse, not another CSV library)

checklist.name: CSV column mapping SKU
checklist.description: The CSV parser maps the column named 'SKU' (uppercase) to the sku field

checklist.name: CSV column mapping QUANTITY
checklist.description: The CSV parser maps the column named 'QUANTITY' (uppercase) to qty using parseInt with radix 10

checklist.name: CSV column mapping COST
checklist.description: The CSV parser maps the column named 'COST' (uppercase) to price using parseFloat multiplied by 100 (and rounded) to store as cents

checklist.name: Zero out discontinued SKUs
checklist.description: After processing the feed, any supplier_products records with SKUs NOT present in the latest feed have their stock_qty set to 0 (discontinued items are not left with stale positive stock)

checklist.name: Cron schedule 4 hours
checklist.description: The scheduled sync job uses the cron expression '0 */4 * * *' (every 4 hours), not a different interval

checklist.name: Promise.allSettled for parallel sync
checklist.description: The scheduled sync processes all suppliers using Promise.allSettled() (not Promise.all()), so one supplier failure does not block others from syncing

checklist.name: Margin revenue from subtotal_cents
checklist.description: The margin calculation uses order.subtotal_cents as the revenue figure

checklist.name: Margin cost from dropship total_cost
checklist.description: The cost figure is the sum of total_cost across all dropship_orders for the given order

checklist.name: Margin percentage formula
checklist.description: Gross margin percentage is calculated as (grossMarginCents / revenue) * 100, with a guard against division by zero when revenue is 0

checklist.name: SQL status filter
checklist.description: The supplier margin report SQL filters dropship_orders by status IN ('confirmed', 'shipped') — does NOT include 'pending', 'submitted', or 'failed' statuses

checklist.name: SQL 30-day window
checklist.description: The supplier margin report SQL filters orders to the last 30 days (e.g., created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days')

checklist.name: NULLIF division guard in SQL
checklist.description: The SQL margin percentage calculation uses NULLIF or equivalent to prevent division by zero on the revenue sum
